changelog:
v1.10.1: Fix regex tim doc_id tu JS (FB escape URL) va ho tro truyen doc_id thu cong
- Sua regex `https:\/\/static...` do FB tra ve html bi escape -> Truoc do quet duoc 0 file JS dan toi dung fallback
- Tra lai tham so doc_id='null' cho Fb.REACTION va build_REACTION cho phep truyen doc_id cung neu muon
